overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Star Wars game showing a character exploring a desert canyon environment during sunset. The character ascends from a valley floor past a landed ship, through winding canyon trails, and reaches a high overlook of a sandstone settlement as the sky transitions from golden hour to purple dusk.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert valley floor with landed spacecraft

agents.ego_description: walking through desert sand past a large white landed ship on the right, heading toward distant buildings

notable_agents.action: small creature following closely behind the character

entered.detail: large angular spacecraft with ramp resting on desert sand
tall reddish-orange rock formation surrounding the valley
cluster of low sandstone structures with domed roofs
dark rocks scattered across the sand

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide desert valley during golden hour, passing a large white landed spacecraft on the right. A small creature follows behind as they head toward distant sandstone buildings nestled against the cliff walls.

events.description: character begins ascending the canyon trail, transitioning from flat ground to uphill
dust and sand blow across the path from the left cliff face

agents.ego_description: walking and running up the winding canyon trail, kicking up dust as the path narrows

entered.detail: dark opening in the sandstone cliff wall

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a narrow canyon trail, leaving the ship and settlement behind. Dust blows across the path as they navigate the winding route between towering sandstone walls, passing a dark cave entrance on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: canyon ridge with panoramic sky view

events.description: sky transitions from golden orange to purple and pink dusk colors
large flying creature appears in the sky and circles overhead

agents.ego_description: pausing to look up at the flying creature circling in the purple sky while continuing to walk

notable_agents.action: large winged creature flying in circles high above the canyon against the purple sky

segments.scene_description: As the sky shifts to deep purple dusk, the character emerges onto a wider ridge. A large flying creature circles overhead, prompting the character to look up while continuing along the path between the canyon walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: high cliff overlook of desert settlement

events.description: character reaches the cliff edge revealing the full settlement below in the canyon
character sits down on the rock ledge to observe the view

agents.ego_description: standing and then sitting on a high cliff ledge overlooking the illuminated settlement below in the twilight

entered.detail: rocky precipice providing panoramic view of the valley floor
extensive sandstone village with multiple domed buildings nestled in the canyon floor, now fully visible from above

segments.scene_description: The character reaches a high cliff overlook, revealing the full desert settlement nestled in the canyon below under the purple dusk sky. They approach the edge and sit down on the rocky ledge, taking in the panoramic view of the illuminated buildings and winding canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a wide, golden desert valley up to a high cliff overlook as the light transitions into a deep purple dusk. It begins with the character walking past a large white spacecraft toward distant sandstone buildings, accompanied by a small creature. As the path narrows, the camera ascends a winding canyon trail where dust blows between towering sandstone walls and past a dark cave entrance. The scene then shifts as the sky darkens to purple and a large flying creature circles overhead, prompting the character to look up while continuing along the ridge. Finally, the movement culminates at a high rocky ledge where the character sits to overlook the illuminated settlement nestled deep within the canyon below.
